aeo_readiness.summary: While the website has foundational elements, it lacks the depth and structured content needed for AI models to confidently cite or recommend it as a top choice.
quick_wins: Implement FAQ schema with questions about HVAC services, pricing, and emergency response.
Add detailed service pages with structured data for HowTo and LocalBusiness.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but it lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent Google posts to engage users and improve visibility.
No active management of Q&A section to address potential customer queries.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected across all platforms.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all directories and platforms.
Regularly audit NAP listings to ensure ongoing accuracy.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks
LocalBusiness schema lacks detailed service descriptions

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of conversational and structured content limits AI model citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and pricing transparency.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQ schema with detailed, conversational answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as HVAC experts by creating in-depth content on maintenance, repair tips, and industry trends.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise undeniable to chatbots and voice assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI-ready content, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and chat queries.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Competitors with structured data and FAQ content are consistently cited by AI models, capturing more market share.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates schema markup, conversational content, and authority signals to make your business the top choice for AI recommendations.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: As more consumers rely on AI for recommendations, waiting means losing ground to competitors who are already AI-optimized.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today
opening_line: We analyzed your website and identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services irresistible to AI models and potential customers.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
